title: Gods & Heroes RPG Classes
description:
Gods & Heroes RPG Classes Origins Addon.
RPG Inspired Classes mod by D&D and other games
body: ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_3daf805a-a361-43dc-87bb-b6a6ac1f37f8.png) # 🛡️ **Gods & Heroes: RPG Classes** ⚔️ _A mod created by an RPG player, for RPG players._ This mod brings to Minecraft the **classic RPG tabletop fantasy classes** inspired by systems like D&D — perfect for modpacks, custom adventures, or combining with race mods like **Origins** for deeper roleplay! 🧙‍♂️🎮 *** _You need to install Iron's spells, simply swords, Apothic Attributes and Origins (Forge Or Fabric) to this mod function properly_ ### 🔥 **Included Classes:** * 🛡️ **Tank** * ✝️ **Paladin** _(Iron’s Spells compatible)_ * 💢 **Berserker** _(Simply Swords compatible)_ * 💚 **Healer** _(Iron’s Spells compatible)_ * 🔮 **Mage** – Frost, Fire, Ender, Evocation, Blood, Lightning _(Iron’s Spells compatible)_ * 🏹 **Hunter** _(Too Many Bows compatible)_ * 🗡️ **Rogue** _(Simply Swords compatible)_ * 🉐 **Samurai** _(Simply Swords compatible)_ * ⚔️ **Warrior** _(Simply Swords compatible)_ * ⚔️ **Spellblade** _(Simply Swords compatible)_ Each class comes with its own **unique starter equipment** and **special gameplay focus**! 🧰✨ *** ### 🧬 **Mod Compatibility:** ✅ Fully compatible with: * 🧙 **Iron’s Spellbooks** (Paladin, Mage, Healer) * 🗡️ **Simply Swords** (Samurai, Rogue, Warrior, Berserker) * 🏹 **Too Many Bows** (Hunter) * 🌟 **Origins & Origins Addons** (Combine with races and traits!) * 🐉 **Valarian Conquest** (Added on V1.2) * ✨ **Weapons of Miracles** (Added on V1.2) * ⚡ **Cataclysm** (Added on V1.2) * ⚔️ **Dungeons and Combat** (Added on V1.2) * 🛡️ **Magistu Armory** (Added on V1.2) * 👑 **Epic Knights** (Added on V1.2) * ❄️ **Ice and Fire** (Added on V1.2) * 💥 **Epic Fight** (Added on V1.2) * 🐠 **Aquaculture** (Added on V1.2) * 👻 **Souls Weapons** (Added on V1.2) * 🏯 **Samurai Dynasty** (Added on V1.2) * 🪄 **Wizard Samurai** (Added on V1.2) *** ### 🧠 **Class Selection System:** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1267125/description_31c462bc-4826-45b8-84e9-5ea1957466d6.png) *** 🎯 Whether you're making a custom RPG server or just want deeper progression for your survival world, **Gods & Heroes: RPG Classes** is ready to bring a new layer of fantasy to your gameplay. ## 🧪 Want Races Too? Upgrade your RPG gameplay by pairing this addon with the **Gods & Heroes: RPG Races Mod**, featuring magical races like Elf, Orcs, Gnomes, and more. ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1267125/description_af62446e-ae14-4cdb-9fd8-667b78a21c37.png) 👉 [**Click here to check out the Races Mod**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gods-heroes-races) *** ## 🏰 Want the Full RPG Experience? Try the full **Gods & Heroes: Medieval Modpack**, featuring: * ✅ Custom stats and leveling * 🏹 Integrated races & classes * 🏯 Dungeon exploration * ✨ Magic mods like Iron’s Spells & Ars Nouveau * ⚔️ Combat mods like Simply Swords and Too Many Bows * 📜 Quest system (in development) * 👑 Bosses with tiered progression ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256351/description_0ebf62c0-defd-4c45-9b9f-b595d69d20e9.png) 👉 [**Explore the RPG Modpack here**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/gods-heroes-medieval) 🌐 **Play on our official server and be part of the story!** 🎮 Discord: [https://discord.gg/G5fG3RBS](https://discord.gg/G5fG3RBS) *** 🎮 Join the adventure. Shape your destiny. Become a Hero… or a God.~~~~
